testCases.testName: Click delete on uploaded file, verify confirmation dialog appears
testCases.notes: Manual UI test - requires user interaction to validate delete button visibility and confirmation dialog behavior. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md

testCases.testName: Confirm deletion, verify file removed from filesystem
testCases.notes: Backend service function validates file is physically deleted from filesystem

testCases.testName: Cancel deletion, verify file remains unchanged
testCases.notes: Manual UI test - requires user interaction to test confirmation dialog cancel button. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md

testCases.testName: Delete file, verify removed from document tree immediately
testCases.notes: Manual UI test - validates state synchronization between backend deletion and frontend document tree. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md

testCases.testName: Delete non-existent file, verify 404 error handled gracefully
testCases.notes: Backend correctly raises FileNotFoundError when file doesn't exist

testCases.testName: Attempt path traversal attack in filename (../), verify security rejection
testCases.notes: Security validation: Path traversal in filename is sanitized and prevented

testCases.testName: Attempt path traversal attack in folder_id, verify security rejection
testCases.notes: Security validation: Path traversal in folder_id raises ValueError

testCases.testName: Attempt absolute path in case_id, verify security rejection
testCases.notes: Security validation: Absolute path in case_id raises ValueError

testCases.testName: Delete last file in uploads folder, verify folder structure remains
testCases.notes: Folder preservation: Deleting last file leaves folder structure intact

testCases.testName: Success deletion, verify toast notification shown
testCases.notes: Manual UI test - validates success toast notification after deletion. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md

testCases.testName: Delete button only visible in uploads folder (not other folders)
testCases.notes: Manual UI test - validates delete button visibility restricted to uploads folder. Implementation verified in CaseTreeExplorer.tsx (isUploadsFolder check). Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md

testCases.testName: Verify selected document cleared if deleted file was selected
testCases.notes: Manual UI test - validates DocumentViewer state cleared when selected file is deleted. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md

testCases.testName: Filename sanitization - spaces, path separators, special characters
testCases.notes: Validates sanitize_filename() handles spaces, path traversal, and special characters correctly
Files with spaces in names can be deleted after sanitization

testCases.testName: Empty case_id rejected with validation error
testCases.notes: Input validation: Empty case_id raises ValueError

testCases.testName: Empty folder_id rejected with validation error
testCases.notes: Input validation: Empty folder_id raises ValueError
Manual UI test - validates context menu delete option. Implementation verified in CaseTreeExplorer.tsx. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md
Manual UI test - validates error handling when backend is unavailable. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md
Manual UI test - validates sequential deletion of multiple files without state issues. Test procedure documented in test_ui_integration.md
